source_anchor: Tier 3 - skill-creator later gained trigger phrases like 'benchmark this skill' and was trimmed substantially
scenario: The historical skill-creator flow was too long and did not advertise post-use benchmarking clearly enough, making skill improvement requests harder to route and execute cleanly.
expected_findings: The description did not clearly advertise benchmarking or post-use improvement.
The body was near the practical size limit and needed tighter progressive disclosure.
Negative triggers and examples were not clear enough for adjacent tasks.
expected_patch_focus: Add benchmark and post-use improvement trigger phrases.
Trim the body and push secondary detail into references.
Add examples and common issues for the audit-and-improve workflow.

replay_plan.failed_slice: Replay a user request such as 'benchmark this skill after it was used' and confirm correct routing.
replay_plan.near_neighbor: Replay a normal 'create a new skill' request that should still trigger the same skill cleanly.
replay_plan.canary: Replay a document-editing request that should route elsewhere.
